gate: Authority to open controlled intake confirmed
evidence: Private launch authority note with approver, scope, and pause owner
noGo: Launch opens without named accountable authority

evidence: Private form, record view, export, backup, and recovery smoke test
noGo: Real intake starts in GitHub Pages or public repository

evidence: Approved notice text and version date in private intake route
noGo: Any real contact details collected before notice is visible

evidence: Screenshot and public-report redaction checklist signed for fake/sample outputs
noGo: Real names, contacts, meeting links, access needs, or incidents appear in public evidence

evidence: Consent text, withdrawal owner, response clock, and deletion path
noGo: Participant cannot withdraw or ask what is stored

gate: Minimum schema in private form only
evidence: Private intake form matches v2.8 minimum data schema
noGo: Open text fields collect sensitive details before review

evidence: Named access register with role, reason, approver, and review date
noGo: Shared admin account or unreviewed private access

evidence: Official paperwork, membership, payment, and charter acceptance path separated
noGo: Official forms, signatures, member numbers, or payment details enter public package

evidence: Private invite channel and access support instructions
noGo: Meeting link appears in public page, public CSV, or screenshot

evidence: 30-minute demo run sheet with moderator and support owner
noGo: Demo runs without moderator, support route, or pause wording

evidence: Founder candidate, supporter, sponsor, and demo-first routes defined
noGo: Supporters or demo-first attendees are counted as charter-ready founders

evidence: Private support contact, follow-up rule, and escalation route
noGo: Access needs copied to public evidence or supporter reports

evidence: Fake-data incident drill with owner, pause wording, closure evidence
noGo: Incident handled only through informal chat with no record

evidence: Four weekly review holds and closeout review booked
noGo: Pilot runs without weekly learning and safety review

evidence: Public info, EOI receipt, demo invite, consent, and closeout messages approved
noGo: Unapproved public wording implies official club status or guaranteed membership

evidence: Fake-data dry-run defect list closed or accepted with owner
noGo: Real intake opens while high-risk defects remain open

evidence: Private decision record with proceed, hold, or no-go result
noGo: Launch proceeds on informal chat approval

evidence: Retention, deletion, learning brief, and handoff closeout date
publicEvidence: Closeout date and aggregate learning rule
noGo: Pilot starts without end-of-pilot deletion and learning decision
